level.setting: The deep core of an active hyper-volcano.

encounters.hazard: Lava geysers erupting at random intervals.

pickup.name: Frost Core
pickup.effect: Infuses earth spells with glacial slowing properties.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem causes the ground to fracture, revealing a path downward.

encounters.hazard: Toxic ash clouds reducing visibility.

pickup.name: Titan's Heart
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to extreme thermal damage.

encounters.trigger: The stalker's death scream shatters a crystalline dam, flooding the bridge ahead with cooled stone.

encounters.hazard: Unstable tectonic plates collapsing beneath the player.

pickup.name: Void Shard
pickup.effect: Required to suppress the boss's aura.

encounters.trigger: The arbiter's collapse pulls back the final veil to the boss chamber.

boss.name: Ignis the World-Burner
boss.victory_condition: Channel the shard into the rift while surviving the boss's onslaught.

level.objective: Seal the volcanic rift before the crust collapses.

level.setting: The collapsing caldera of Mount Havoc.

encounters.hazard: Lava Geysers

pickup.name: Crystalline Shard
pickup.effect: Infuses fire spells with glacial energy.

encounters.trigger: Stepping onto the glowing rune platform opens the path to the Boiling Chasm.

encounters.hazard: Falling Ash Clouds

pickup.name: Thermal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to extreme heat.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the bridge to the Core Chamber to manifest.

encounters.hazard: Erupting Magma Pillars

pickup.name: Volcanic Core
pickup.effect: Used to exploit the boss's internal pressure.

encounters.trigger: The death of the Wraith shatters the seal on the Heart of the Volcano.

boss.name: Prime Ignis
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Volcanic Core into the boss to cool its internal core.

level.objective: Stabilize the volcano by defeating the Prime Ignis.

level.setting: Deep beneath the crust of a dying tectonic plate.

encounters.hazard: Lava geysers erupting from floor cracks.

pickup.name: Frost Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Temporarily imbues weapon with cryogenic properties.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem causes the bridge to collapse, forcing a path into the Sulfur Caves.

encounters.hazard: Toxic sulfur gas clouds reducing visibility.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to extreme heat.

encounters.trigger: The stalker's death triggers a seismic shift opening the door to the Core Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Falling molten boulders from the ceiling.

pickup.name: Crystal Catalyst
pickup.effect: Stabilizes energy to neutralize infernal fire.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the knight unlocks the primary containment seal to the Caldera Boss.

boss.name: Ignis the World-Burner
boss.victory_condition: Channel the catalyst into the altar while surviving Ignis's final phase.

level.objective: Extinguish the volcanic core before it triggers a continental eruption.
level.reward: The Eternal Aegis shield and the title of Savior of the Plate.

encounters.hazard: Lava geysers

pickup.name: Cryo-Core
pickup.effect: Infuses the greataxe with sub-zero temperatures.

encounters.trigger: Slaughtering the Stalker causes the ground to crack open, revealing a path to the inner caldera.

encounters.hazard: Falling brimstone

pickup.name: Obsidian Key
pickup.effect: Disables the volcanic sealing runes.

encounters.trigger: The Warlord drops a pulsating obsidian key that unlocks the boss chamber.

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas vents

pickup.name: Titan Heart Fragment
pickup.effect: Increases damage resistance by 50 percent.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the magma chamber to collapse, exposing the ancient Titan.

boss.name: Ember Titan
boss.victory_condition: Crush the Titan's core while it is weakened by the heart fragment.

level.objective: Slaughter the Fire Titan to restore balance to the desolate wasteland.

level.setting: An ancient, abandoned dwarven forge located deep within a dormant volcano.

encounters.hazard: Lava pools erupting at intervals.

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Flask
pickup.effect: Temporarily imbues the weapon with freezing properties.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scuttler causes a hidden steam vent to blast open, revealing a path to the inner caldera.

encounters.hazard: Choking sulfur clouds that obscure vision.

pickup.name: Thermal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to heat damage for 30 seconds.

encounters.trigger: The sentinel collapses into a pile of ash, unlocking the sealed pressure gate to the heart of the volcano.

encounters.hazard: Falling igneous rocks.

pickup.name: Master Keycard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Forbidden Caldera.

encounters.trigger: The construct explodes, revealing the primary control console for the boss's containment unit.

boss.name: Ignis the Eternal
boss.victory_condition: Overload the containment field using the Master Keycard while the boss is exposed.

level.objective: Stabilize the volcanic core before it erupts.
level.reward: The Heart of the Forge Artifact.

level.setting: An eerie volcanic landscape filled with black spires and glowing molten rivers.

encounters.hazard: Lava geysers erupting at intervals.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the altar of ash triggers the activation of the stone guardian.

pickup.name: Thunderstone

encounters.trigger: Opening the tunnel door attracts the stalking predator.

encounters.trigger: Crossing the midpoint of the bridge reveals the master of the volcano.

boss.name: Inferno Sovereign

level.objective: Deactivate the Heart of the Volcano to stabilize the rift.

encounters.trigger: The defeated bunny rolls over to reveal the entrance to the Obsidian Throne.

level.objective: Tame the volcanic spirits and restore peace to the Whispering Volcano.

encounters.hazard: Flickering void gaps that drain mana.

encounters.hazard: Blinding light flashes that obscure vision.

encounters.trigger: The Construct falls, and the shards converge to awaken the Apex Guardian.

boss.name: Apex Guardian of Silence

level.objective: Ascend the celestial mountain to restore balance to the stars.
level.reward: The Crown of Ethereal Peace, granting flight and eternal wisdom.
